benefits.description: GHRP-2 used for appetite stimulation on old dog
LL-37 used for immune system support on old dog
Dog lived to 17 years old, breed average life expectancy 11-13 years

protocol_notes: User gave old dog GHRP-2 (or GHRP-6, uncertain) for appetite stimulation and LL-37 for immune system. Dog lived to 17 years despite breed average of 11-13 years. User also mixes water-soluble lipo-B, L-carnitine, taurine with oil-based CoQ10 and vitamin D for personal use with lab confirmation of efficacy.
